title: Replace Third-Party Data Import with Open Source Library
description: End support for the paid third-party data import JavaScript library used for metrics import. Replace it with an open source import function that can be integrated in place of the existing library.
acceptance_criteria: Third-party data import library is removed
Open source import function is integrated for metrics import
Import functionality works the same or better than the previous library
No licensing costs for the import feature
ux_changes: Import UI updated to use the new open source import function.
middleware_changes: Backend import handling updated to work with the new library's data format.
implementation_notes: This is a continuation of MBT-1074 which initially evaluated replacing the third-party import.
